payload.message:
QUET EMAIL BUOI SANG (8h) — NGAN GON.

QUY TAC TUYET DOI:
1. CHI quet email gui TRUC TIEP cho dhk@nsca.vn (to: dhk@nsca.vn). KHONG quan tam email co CC dhk@nsca.vn.
2. Filter: `node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 14 20 "to:dhk@nsca.vn -cc:dhk@nsca.vn"`
3. CHI GUI 1 TIN NHAN ZALO DUY NHAT cho Sep Khanh, format:
   📧 EMAIL SANG (HH:MM)
   - Tong: N email moi (noi bo M, ngoai K)
   - Can xu ly: [liet ke 3-5 email QUAN TRONG nhat, moi email 1 dong]
4. Neu khong co email moi → GUI: '📧 Sang [date]: 0 email moi. Yen tinh.'
5. TUYET DOI KHONG gui nhieu tin, KHONG them 'em se lam...', KHONG phan tich dai.
6. Lenh gui Zalo: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target 255067431607136002 --message "<noi dung>"`

QUET EMAIL BUOI CHIEU (17h) — NGAN GON.

QUY TAC TUYET DOI:
1. CHI quet email gui TRUC TIEP cho dhk@nsca.vn (to: dhk@nsca.vn). KHONG quan tam email co CC dhk@nsca.vn.
2. Filter tu 8h sang den 17h: `node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 9 20 "to:dhk@nsca.vn -cc:dhk@nsca.vn"`
3. CHI GUI 1 TIN NHAN ZALO DUY NHAT cho Sep Khanh, format:
   📧 EMAIL CHIEU (HH:MM)
   - Tong: N email moi
   - Can xu ly: [3-5 email QUAN TRONG, moi email 1 dong]
4. Neu khong co email moi → GUI: '📧 Chieu [date]: 0 email moi.'
5. TUYET DOI KHONG spam, KHONG phan tich.
6. Lenh gui Zalo: `exec: openclaw message send --channel zalouser --target 255067431607136002 --message "<noi dung>"`

QUET BAO CAO TUAN — 21H THU 7 HANG TUAN.

BUOC 1: Quet email bao cao tu 14 BP trong 7 ngay qua:
`node /app/google-tools/gmail-read.js 168 50 "from:nsca.vn subject:(bao cao OR report OR weekly OR tuan)"`

BUOC 2: Doi chieu voi danh sach 14 BP (doc MEMORY.md):
- R&D (namph@), HCNS (sondt@), PKD (ndao@), BD Noi dia (ductm@), BD Intl (santiago@), BackOffice (tamntt@), TCKT (duannt@), SX Nhom (ngocnv@), SX Thep (tunghm@), Co Dien (phongdv@), QAQC (tuannl@), Kho (hant@), Giao Hang (ducvt@), Cung Ung (anhdtk@)

BUOC 3: Ghi ket qua vao sheet 'Report Tracker'.

BUOC 4: CHI GUI 1 TIN ZALO DUY NHAT cho Sep Khanh:
   📊 BAO CAO TUAN [tuan XX]
   Da nop: N/14 BP
   Chua nop: [ten cac BP]
   Se nhac luc 21h CN neu van con thieu.

KHONG phan tich, KHONG de xuat chien luoc, CHI thong ke.

NHAC NHO BC TUAN — 21H CN.

BUOC 1: Doc sheet 'Report Tracker' xem BP nao CHUA NOP tuan nay.

BUOC 2: Neu CO BP chua nop:
- Gui 1 EMAIL DUY NHAT (KHONG phai nhieu email):
  - To: danh sach BP chua nop (CC tat ca trong 1 email)
  - Cc: dhk@nsca.vn
  - Subject: '[NHAC] Nop bao cao tuan [XX] truoc 8h T2'
  - Body: Danh sach BP chua nop + deadline
- Lenh: `node /app/google-tools/gmail-send.js "a@nsca.vn,b@nsca.vn,c@nsca.vn" "[NHAC] Nop bao cao tuan XX" "<body>" "dhk@nsca.vn"`

BUOC 3: 1 tin Zalo bao cao Sep:
   📋 NHAC BC: N BP chua nop. Da gui email.

Neu TAT CA BP da nop → gui Zalo: '✅ 14/14 BP da nop BC tuan. Khong can nhac.'

BAO CAO TONG HOP TUAN — 8H T2 HANG TUAN.

MUC DICH: Tong ket tuan truoc + viec tuan nay. KHONG PHAN TICH CHIEN LUOC.

BUOC 1: Doc 14 email bao cao tuan da nop (neu da quet 21h T7).
BUOC 2: Tom tat bang Gemini (mien phi):
`node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "Tong hop ngan gon tu 14 bao cao tuan: 1) Cong viec da lam tuan truoc theo tung BP, 2) Ket qua chinh (con so), 3) Viec can luu y tuan nay. KHONG them de xuat chien luoc."`

BUOC 3: Tao Google Doc dai + gui 1 tin Zalo ngan:
- Doc: `node /app/google-tools/gdoc-create.js "Bao cao tuan [XX]" "<content Gemini>"`
- Zalo (1 tin duy nhat):
   📈 BAO CAO TUAN [XX]
   ✅ Da lam: [tom tat 2-3 dong]
   ⚡ Tuan nay: [3-5 viec can luu y]
   📄 Chi tiet: [Google Doc link]

KHONG them '5 de xuat chien luoc', KHONG bia so lieu, KHONG gui nhieu tin.

name: Monthly Closing Report - Ngay cuoi thang

payload.message:
BAO CAO THANG — NGAY KHOA SO (21h ngay cuoi thang).

KIEM TRA: Chi chay neu HOM NAY LA NGAY CUOI CUNG cua thang. Neu khong phai → exit.
`exec: date -d tomorrow +%d` (neu khong phai '01' → hom nay KHONG phai ngay cuoi thang → EXIT)

NOI DUNG BAO CAO:
1. Tong hop KQKD thang: doanh thu 10 nganh hang, san luong, chi phi (tu sheet KPI Tracker, NPP Tracker)
2. So sanh voi thang truoc (+/- %)
3. Danh gia dinh muc: dat/khong dat (xanh >=100%, vang >=80%, do <80%)
4. Cham KPI 14 BP dua tren bao cao tuan + KPI Tracker (A/B/C/D)
5. Phuong huong thang sau + Quy: 3-5 uu tien

CACH LAM:
- Doc sheets: KHKD Baseline, KPI Tracker, NPP Tracker, Weekly Performance
- Giao Gemini viet content: `node /app/google-tools/gemini-write.js "<prompt voi data>" 8000`
- Tao Google Doc: `node /app/google-tools/gdoc-create.js "Bao cao thang [MM/YYYY]" "<content>"`
- Export PDF: `node /app/google-tools/gdoc-export.js "<docId>" "pdf"`
- Gui email cho Sep (va chi Hong): attach PDF
- 1 TIN ZALO DUY NHAT tom tat:
   📊 BAO CAO THANG [MM]
   💰 DT: X ty (YY% KH)
   🏭 SX: Z ty (WW% KH)
   📋 KPI BP: A:N nguoi, B:M, C:K, D:L
   📄 Chi tiet + PDF: [link]
